string 2: Hm? All by yourself today? What happened to the other two?

The puppet master behind the Titans seeks to invade the
human world, huh? That explains the abonormalities in the sky.

Must be a sign of a gate opening. I'm sure public safety has
noticed, too... and is rushing to ready that awful weapon.

I hear they've incorporated the power of a Digimon they
captured into it.

Once that weapon is deployed and they turn it on the Titans, 
the damage will be unprecedented—a war to end all wars.

There was a section in the underground lab even I wasn't
allowed into. Maybe that's where they're doing experiments.

I can show you the way. A nice little visit to my old office... 
This has gone on long enough.
His core has already been installed into that weapon.

I see... So this is Kuga's doing. You could say it's right
up his alley.
Poor Vulcanusmon...{next}
I remember Vulcanusmon wanted to go to the human world...{next}
That Digimon sure loved action figures...{next}

According to the records, his core was taken out thirty
minutes ago. I'm sorry, but he's already...
The fools! I'm ashamed to say I ever worked for them!
...Damn it.
No cure for stupidity, as they say...

If only I were smarter... I'd develop a cure for human
foolishness...
I'm so sorry...!
I really am...!

A master of all smithing techniques, Vulcanusmon, the avatar of
the forge god, could craft anything you could ever think of.
He couldn't help but be drawn to the mystique of the human world.

When Vulcanusmon finally got to visit, he connected with humans, exchanged
knowledge and friendship with them, and truly enjoyed his time there.

However, that joy ended up being short-lived. Tragedy befell Vulcanusmon,
as he found himself captured by humans with villainous intent.

These humans used the knowledge and craftsmanship learned from Vulcanusmon
himself to create various weapons to threaten and harm Digimon.

Eventually, the humans attempt to construct a massive humanoid weapon—
a Giant Slayer—capable of wiping out all Digimon from existence.

Not only was Vulcanusmon used as a test subject, but in a true
display of horror, his body was assimilated into the weapon.

With a sincere hope of improving the world, Vulcanusmon offered his knowledge to humanity
in good faith. Yet, in a cruel twist of fate, he became a threat to the world instead.
Could this tragedy have possibly been averted...?

That's strange. I've always felt a time travel "heartbeat" after 
Akashic Vision screenings...

...but not this time. Maybe time travel won't happen. The
cry of the dark shadow still shakes the In-Between, though.

Is it trying to tell us something...? Could there be some
unfinished business before the script gets rewritten...?
I'm sorry, but this Digimon's...
The fools! I'm ashamed to say I ever worked for them!
No time travel this time...?{next}

Speak of the devil... It seems they're engaging in more
foolishness.
If I had to guess, I'd say the weapon's been activated.
Oh, Dr. Yuki... What would you do at a time like this?
We have to put a stop to it!{next}
They'll just cause more war...{next}
The world will be destroyed again.{next}

There's no cure for human stupidity... All the more reason
why us humans are responsible for cleaning up our own mess.

If that weapon activates now, this won't be a war so much
as a one-sided massacre.

I feel kind of pathetic as a scientist asking the gods for help...
but, let us pray it doesn't come to that.

Regardless of how it got to be that way... That weapon is
incredibly powerful right now.

A considerable number of Digimon were sacrificed... I imagine
all of their power has been absorbed by the weapon.

There's an elevator over there. I bet it would take us to
the surface.
I wanted to save Inori...
That's why I did it—over and over and over...
You must have seen it a bunch of times, right, {player}?
The dark shadow... That was...
That was YOU, Aegiomon?!{next}
You kept trying to save Inori?{next}
That's why you traveled through time again and again?{next}
More times than I could count. And, after all that, I knew.
I knew... what I really was.

If I hadn't been born, if I'd never fallen into the human
world... this never would've happened to Inori.

Just before Chronomon, defeated in combat against the
higher being, was sealed away...

...he left behind a means to one day break the seal and
fulfill his true desire.

Chronomon created fictional legends and a new "Great Guardian," 
one who could play Chronomon's destined role.

All of the turmoil and conflict that happened so far...
All of it might have been to help me grow.

I'm just a spare part to help fulfill Chronomon's wishes...
a component that grows more complete by the minute.

And now, I've mastered the ability to travel through time.
That's proof enough.
You've already realized it, too, haven't you? That you're my—

Aegiomon was the demon created by Chronomon, the surrogate
meant to inherit his power to tamper with time.

The essence of the power to control time is the desire to change
the present. This war was intended to create despair.

He created a situation so tragic, so unacceptable... He cared
not who won or lost, just to hurt as many as he could.

A powerful prayer to rewrite the future was necessary to 
awaken the power to control time.

An intense plea born of abject despair, strong enough to
warp the very precepts of our world.

But... not all has gone as Chronomon planned.
You. You can still find him. Reach out to him.
Ngh...
You mean to... inflict more pain... on this body of mine?
I've come to rescue you.{next}
We met eight years ago.{next}
Still hooked on action figures?{next}
...Oh! I remember you!
You're...
...Aegiomon, right?
That would be a big nope.{next}
I'm no Digimon. I'm a human.{next}
No Digimon would dress like this.{next}
Ah... Y-You don't say...?
...Wh-Who's there?!
A-an intruder?! Who the hell are you?!
An acquaintance of Dr. Simmons.{next}
A kindred spirit of Dr. Simmons.{next}
A dear friend of Dr. Simmons.{next}
S-Simmons?!
Ngrrrrrrrgh...!
UWAAAAAAAAAAAGH!
...Let's get out of here.{next}
I was so close...

Just a little more... and the weapon of my dreams
would've been a reality!
If I don't complete it one hundred percent...
...I'll never beat Simmons...! I'll never... surpass her!
I-I-I won't let you interfeeeeere!
D-Damn it all...!
Tell Simmons this...!

I can't deny there's a small drop in power output, but I'll
have that weapon activated in no time!

And when that happens, I'll never be under that accursed
thumb of yours ever again!
...Where are you?

We have to prevent public safety from deploying the giant 
weapon. We're going to the underground lab now...

What? You're already at the site? You sure move quickly.
I expect nothing less from an Agent.
We're on our way, too. We'll arrive shortly, so wait right there.
Is that right...? Damn that Kuga...
Whew... Thanks. You really saved my hide.
I know it's way too late to say something like this, but...
...not all of us humans hate Digimon.
I'm sorry, I truly am. From the bottom of my heart.
Now, now. Lift your head.
Of course, you can't expect me to forgive you right away...
What I'll need from you first is...

..."action figures." About five of them should do the trick, 
I imagine.

You can get your hands on them in that "Akihabara" place, 
I'm told.
...what?
HAHAHAHAHA!

Vulcanusmon, who had been turned into the control unit
of the weapon...

...was saved by sympathetic humans, ashamed by the
suffering they had brought upon Digimon.

Although Vulcanusmon was willing to forgive humanity,
the wicked machinations of humans must be put to a stop.
To that end, Digimon and humans fought as one...

...so that the tragedy set to descend upon the world in the
near future might be averted.
Now, then... Six apostles of Iliad remain. You must hurry.

The apostles of Iliad also serve as the "bonds" reaching
out to save those who have fallen into darkness.

As for what will become of the demon... That, we cannot
know for certain yet.
For his heart is still present. But, in any case...

The time of the world's end draws near... The next hand of
fate points toward Rebellion Village.
